chatDialog.title: Chat Settings
chatDialog.description: Customize send shortcuts, message actions, export options, and navigation preferences.
chatDialog.sendShortcutDesc: Choose how to send messages with Enter or modifier keys.
chatDialog.confirmDeleteDesc: Show a confirmation prompt before deleting a message.
chatDialog.confirmRegenerateDesc: Show a confirmation prompt before regenerating a message.
chatDialog.translateLanguagesDesc: Choose multiple supported target languages for the input translate button with searchable selection.
chatDialog.showTranslateConfirmDesc: Show a confirmation prompt before overwriting the input with translation.
chatDialog.translateTargetLanguageDesc: The input translate button will translate into this language.
chatDialog.pasteLongTextAsFileDesc: Convert very long pasted text into a file attachment to avoid oversized messages.
chatDialog.pasteLongTextThresholdDesc: When the pasted text exceeds this number of characters, it will be attached as a file.
chatDialog.autoTranslateWithSpaceDesc: Trigger auto-translation when you type three spaces quickly in the input (experimental).
chatDialog.showMessageOutlineDesc: Show a subtle border around each message to improve separation.
chatDialog.messageNavigationDesc: Quickly jump to the previous/next user message.
chatDialog.gridTriggerDesc: Choose how the multi-model comparison grid preview is triggered.
chatDialog.developerModeDesc: Show the developer settings page, debug passthrough, and experimental entry points.
